reviews.review_description: The game is fun really, mechanics and everything make me feel like im actually there. Just its a little slow paced for me, and knocking opponents out is really easy for some reason. You also cant see your coin meters so you dont know how much you have. I cant complain too much but i hope the game gets more updates to fix this
Games pretty good but I hope there’s more customization and more bots
Nah seriously i was thinking i would be the robot but no im just the guy who controls from a distance like at least let us be in the robots pov

The game is really fun but the countdown is useless as the bots keep going down for 10 seconds and still get back up, also the game has a bug where I can’t punch at all, the bots will also attack whilst getting up leaving you no chance to dodge or block, however the game is still pretty fun when it comes to the mechanics, the dodging feels pretty good as well as the punching
its good but wouldnt pay 6quid for it
